description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat, terracotta-tiled roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, with large glass windows and sliding doors visible on one side, suggesting an open-plan living area. The front facade features a small, partially enclosed entryway with vertical black columns and landscaped greenery. The rear of the bungalow includes a covered patio area with a wooden deck, providing outdoor living space. The roofline is clean and linear, with minimal overhangs and a small rooftop structure, possibly for ventilation or utilities. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat terracotta-tiled roof, light gray walls, and large glass windows, featuring a covered patio and landscaped entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entryway with black columns, large glass windows, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, light gray wall with multiple windows and the flat terracotta-tiled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio area with a wooden deck and a small rooftop structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid wall, minimal windows, and the patio area partially visible.
